entry.title: Ganguly opens up on being dropped from ODI team

link.title: Ganguly opens up on being dropped from ODI team

entry.content:
#ganguly
Sourav Ganguly explains how he was dropped from Dhoni’s ODI team
தான் சிறப்பாக ஆடிய போதும் தன்னை அணியை விட்டு நீக்கி விட்டார்கள் என தற்போது ஒரு பேட்டியில் கூறி இருக்கிறார் கங்குலி
entry.summary: #ganguly Sourav Ganguly explains how he was dropped from Dhoni’s ODI team தான் சிறப்பாக ஆடிய போதும் தன்னை அணியை விட்டு நீக்கி விட்டார்கள் என தற்போது ஒரு பேட்டியில் கூறி இருக்கிறார் கங்குலி

entry.title: Dushman-e-Jaan Episode 25 - 13th July 2020

link.title: Dushman-e-Jaan Episode 25 - 13th July 2020

entry.content:
“Dushman-e-Jaan” is the story of two sisters, Ramsha and Rubab, and a man who made an irredeemable mistake caused by his pride and anger that destroyed the life of Ramsha. Rubab makes the mistake of befriending the same man unaware of the fact that he is her biggest enemy.
Tooba Siddiqui as Ramsha is the eldest daughter of her family. She belongs to a middle-class background and works hard to support her family. She is a straight-forward and headstrong girl.
Mohib Mirza as Hatim belongs to an elite background. He is proud, arrogant, and does not believe in the concept of marriage. Hatim and Ramsha work at the same office.
Madiha Imam as Rubab is a simple, sweet, and innocent girl who loves her family a lot. She is very close to her sister, Ramsha.
entry.summary: “Dushman-e-Jaan” is the story of two sisters, Ramsha and Rubab, and a man who made an irredeemable mistake caused by his pride and anger that destroyed the life of Ramsha. Rubab makes the mistake of befriending the same man unaware of the fact that he is her biggest enemy. Tooba Siddiqui as Ramsha is the eldest daughter of her family. She belongs to a middle-class background and works hard to support her family. She is a straight-forward and headstrong girl. Mohib Mirza as Hatim belongs to an elite background. He is proud, arrogant, and does not believe in the concept of marriage. Hatim and Ramsha work at the same office. Madiha Imam as Rubab is a simple, sweet, and innocent girl who loves her family a lot. She is very close to her sister, Ramsha.

entry.title: Harvard observatory took the first photograph of a star and other important events in history

link.title: Harvard observatory took the first photograph of a star and other important events in history

entry.content: The first photograph of a star was taken on this day in 1850 at the Harvard Observatory. The star photographed was Vega in the Lyra constellation, the 2nd brightest star in the Northern Hemisphere. The Civil War brought the return of governmentally issued paper money to this country. On July 17, 1861 Congress authorized the printing and circulation of Legal Tender paper worth 60 million dollars. The Constitution Act of 1919 specified that Finland would become a republic and served as the nation’s first constitution. The ratification of Finland’s form of government laid the foundations for the country’s modern democracy and highly functional society. France abandoned atmospheric nuclear testing in 1974 and moved to underground testing in the midst of intense world pressure which was sparked by the New Zealand Government of the time, which sent two frigates in July 1973 to the atoll in protest for a nuclear free Pacific.
entry.summary: The first photograph of a star was taken on this day in 1850 at the Harvard Observatory. The star photographed was Vega in the Lyra constellation, the 2nd brightest star in the Northern Hemisphere. The Civil War brought the return of governmentally issued paper money to this country. On July 17, 1861 Congress authorized the printing and circulation of Legal Tender paper worth 60 million dollars. The Constitution Act of 1919 specified that Finland would become a republic and served as the nation’s first constitution. The ratification of Finland’s form of government laid the foundations for the country’s modern democracy and highly functional society. France abandoned atmospheric nuclear testing in 1974 and moved to underground testing in the midst of intense world pressure which was sparked by the New Zealand Government of the time, which sent two frigates in July 1973 to the atoll in protest for a nuclear free Pacific.

entry.title: Fireworks and smoke bombs fired towards Portland’s county justice center

link.title: Fireworks and smoke bombs fired towards Portland’s county justice center

entry.content:
Protesters light diversion smoke bombs and fireworks outside the county Justice Center in downtown Portland on July 18.
The clip, filmed outside the Justice Center shows sparks from the bombs flying into the crowd while protesters cheer and clap along.
"So this is a new thing that happened! Protesters light a diversion smoke bomb so they can barricade the doors to the Justice Center, there are a lot of people here, it’s both cool and scary!" The filmer, Grace Morgan, wrote on social media.
Portland Police released a statement that said: "around 12:30 a.m. PT (3:30 a.m. ET), protesters were ‘shooting commercial-grade fireworks and smoke bombs towards the (county) justice center’ across the street from the federal courthouse."
entry.summary: Protesters light diversion smoke bombs and fireworks outside the county Justice Center in downtown Portland on July 18. The clip, filmed outside the Justice Center shows sparks from the bombs flying into the crowd while protesters cheer and clap along. "So this is a new thing that happened! Protesters light a diversion smoke bomb so they can barricade the doors to the Justice Center, there are a lot of people here, it’s both cool and scary!" The filmer, Grace Morgan, wrote on social media. Portland Police released a statement that said: "around 12:30 a.m. PT (3:30 a.m. ET), protesters were ‘shooting commercial-grade fireworks and smoke bombs towards the (county) justice center’ across the street from the federal courthouse."

entry.title: Suresh Raina start Practice with Mohammed Shami and Piyush Chawla, Watch Video वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Suresh Raina start Practice with Mohammed Shami and Piyush Chawla, Watch Video वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Suresh Raina start Practice with Mohammed Shami and Piyush Chawla, Watch Video. Indian cricketers in Suresh Raina, Mohammed Shami, and Piyush Chawla engaged in the same. While international cricket came to the fore ten days ago as England and West Indies battled in a thrilling Test match in Southampton it remains on a standstill in India.
वेस्टइंडीज और इंग्लैंड के बीच टेस्ट मैच से क्रिकेट और खिलाड़ियों की मैदान पर वापसी हो गई है। अब बीसीसीआइ भी दुबई में आइपीएल कराने की तैयारियों में जुटी है। ऐसे में क्रिकेटर भी प्रैक्टिस का कोई मौका नहीं छोड़ रहे हैं। जहां जाते हैं वहां मौका मिलते ही प्रैक्टिस करने में जुट जाते हैं। ऐसा ही नजारा अमरोहा में टीम इंडिया के तेज गेंदबाज मोहम्मद शमी के फार्म हाउस पर देखने को मिला।
#SureshRaina #MohammedShami #PiyushChawla
entry.summary: Suresh Raina start Practice with Mohammed Shami and Piyush Chawla, Watch Video. Indian cricketers in Suresh Raina, Mohammed Shami, and Piyush Chawla engaged in the same. While international cricket came to the fore ten days ago as England and West Indies battled in a thrilling Test match in Southampton it remains on a standstill in India. वेस्टइंडीज और इंग्लैंड के बीच टेस्ट मैच से क्रिकेट और खिलाड़ियों की मैदान पर वापसी हो गई है। अब बीसीसीआइ भी दुबई में आइपीएल कराने की तैयारियों में जुटी है। ऐसे में क्रिकेटर भी प्रैक्टिस का कोई मौका नहीं छोड़ रहे हैं। जहां जाते हैं वहां मौका मिलते ही प्रैक्टिस करने में जुट जाते हैं। ऐसा ही नजारा अमरोहा में टीम इंडिया के तेज गेंदबाज मोहम्मद शमी के फार्म हाउस पर देखने को मिला। #SureshRaina #MohammedShami #PiyushChawla

entry.title: Un mois après leur réouverture, les salles de cinéma peinent à se remplir

link.title: Un mois après leur réouverture, les salles de cinéma peinent à se remplir

entry.content:
Le cinéma traverse une crise sans précédent. Un mois après la reprise des salles, sa fréquentation laisse à désirer. Seule la perspective de sorties de grosses productions en août est une source d’espoir./>
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le cinéma traverse une crise sans précédent. Un mois après la reprise des salles, sa fréquentation laisse à désirer. Seule la perspective de sorties de grosses productions en août est une source d’espoir./> Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Report de la réforme de l’assurance chômage : quels changements pour les demandeurs d’emploi ?

link.title: Report de la réforme de l’assurance chômage : quels changements pour les demandeurs d’emploi ?

entry.content:
Jean Castex a annoncé vendredi 17 juillet que la réforme de l’assurance-chômage allait être repoussée au 1er janvier prochain. Ce report concernant l’ensemble de la réforme, y compris le premier volet entré en vigueur le 1er novembre, de nombreux points d’interrogation persistent.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: Jean Castex a annoncé vendredi 17 juillet que la réforme de l’assurance-chômage allait être repoussée au 1er janvier prochain. Ce report concernant l’ensemble de la réforme, y compris le premier volet entré en vigueur le 1er novembre, de nombreux points d’interrogation persistent. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :

entry.title: EVENING 5: Glove makers hit new highs

link.title: EVENING 5: Glove makers hit new highs

entry.content: The gloves mania continues, with Supermax Corp, Top Glove Corp and Hartalega Holdings all rising to fresh record highs. Meanwhile, ex-Election Commission chairman Datuk Azhar Azizan Harun is made the Dewan Rakyat’s Speaker without a vote from MPs.
entry.summary: The gloves mania continues, with Supermax Corp, Top Glove Corp and Hartalega Holdings all rising to fresh record highs. Meanwhile, ex-Election Commission chairman Datuk Azhar Azizan Harun is made the Dewan Rakyat’s Speaker without a vote from MPs.

entry.title: Month old bridge collapsed, watch corruption story of Bihar

link.title: Month old bridge collapsed, watch corruption story of Bihar

entry.content: A portion of the Sattarghat Bridge on Gandak River in Gopalganj of Bihar collapsed on Wednesday, a month after it was inaugurated by Bihar CM Nitish Kumar. The bridge collapse has now triggered a political row in the state. These cases of corruption in Bihar are not new. Watch this report to know how deep the roots of corruption are in the system of Bihar.
entry.summary: A portion of the Sattarghat Bridge on Gandak River in Gopalganj of Bihar collapsed on Wednesday, a month after it was inaugurated by Bihar CM Nitish Kumar. The bridge collapse has now triggered a political row in the state. These cases of corruption in Bihar are not new. Watch this report to know how deep the roots of corruption are in the system of Bihar.

entry.title: First-ever 2021 Ford Bronco Sport Driving Video

link.title: First-ever 2021 Ford Bronco Sport Driving Video

entry.content:
Ford unveils the 2021 Bronco – including a classic two-door and first-ever four-door – the flagship of an all-new family of rugged off-road vehicles.
The all-4x4 Bronco brand is Built Wild™ and ready to deliver thrilling experiences with its heritage-inspired style, engineering and smart off-road technology, plus innovative features to help outdoor enthusiasts create adventures in the most remote corners of the world.
The all-new Bronco re-enters the scene with an all-4x4 lineup with production beginning in early 2021 and first models arriving in Ford dealerships next spring. Bronco owners can choose from an extensive lineup of more than 200 factory-backed accessories for maximum personalization, enabling dealers to provide outfitting-on-demand for each customer’s individual adventure needs.
entry.summary: Ford unveils the 2021 Bronco – including a classic two-door and first-ever four-door – the flagship of an all-new family of rugged off-road vehicles. The all-4x4 Bronco brand is Built Wild™ and ready to deliver thrilling experiences with its heritage-inspired style, engineering and smart off-road technology, plus innovative features to help outdoor enthusiasts create adventures in the most remote corners of the world. The all-new Bronco re-enters the scene with an all-4x4 lineup with production beginning in early 2021 and first models arriving in Ford dealerships next spring. Bronco owners can choose from an extensive lineup of more than 200 factory-backed accessories for maximum personalization, enabling dealers to provide outfitting-on-demand for each customer’s individual adventure needs.

entry.title: How The Moor Market is ensuring you can shop local – and safely

link.title: How The Moor Market is ensuring you can shop local – and safely

entry.content: The Moor Market is back up and running, with a host of safety provisions to keep its customers safe.
entry.summary: The Moor Market is back up and running, with a host of safety provisions to keep its customers safe.
